understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to move pushable objects onto specific goal tiles marked with '+', or otherwise satisfy the game’s victory condition as reported by the engine (WIN). This typically involves manipulating pieces within a grid containing obstacles and selectable objects.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is controlled via either directional moves (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN) or clicking on selectable pieces to change which is active. Only the currently selected piece responds to movement actions. Pieces cannot move through walls or blocked spaces; a movement that would result in this is ignored. Clicking on a piece that is already selected does nothing, while clicking on a different selectable switches control. Pieces may be moved toward goal tiles via valid (unblocked) directions. Each level has a finite step count; once it reaches zero, the run ends, regardless of progress.
